news.headline: Kestra Medical Technologies, Ltd. closes IPO with over-allotment option exercised in full, sells 1,782,352 shares at $17.00 each, raising $232M.
news.summary: Kestra Medical Technologies, Ltd., a company specializing in wearable medical devices and digital healthcare, revealed that the underwriters of its initial public offering have fully exercised their over-allotment option, purchasing 1,782,352 additional shares of common stock at the set price of $17.00 per share. This brings the total shares sold in the offering to 13,664,704, generating roughly $232 million in gross proceeds for Kestra, before accounting for underwriting discounts, commissions, and other expenses. The sale of the over-allotment option was finalized on March 14, 2025, in Kirkland, Washington.

news.headline: Toronto Stock Index posts biggest gain since August.
INFRA announces plans for first "Giga Hub" in LA, advancing global AV infrastructure, targeting smart city expansion.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, a San Francisco tech firm called INFRA revealed its intention to establish its inaugural "Giga Hub" in Los Angeles. This move marks a significant step in the company's initiative to expand and develop a worldwide infrastructure for autonomous vehicles (AVs).

news.headline: ExGen completes acquisition of Spark North Lithium Project, expanding its portfolio.
ExoPTEN study shows potential in enhancing motor function, blood flow, and spinal cord injury recovery.
news.summary: A preclinical study conducted on ExoPTEN has shown promising results in enhancing motor function and increasing blood flow following spinal cord injuries. The study revealed a significant improvement in motor function, with a notable increase in blood flow post-injury. Additionally, faster recovery was observed in subjects treated with ExoPTEN. These findings suggest the potential of ExoPTEN in improving outcomes for individuals with spinal cord injuries.

news.headline: Dow Jones Industrial Average posts biggest weekly percent drop since March 2023.
S&P 500 and Nasdaq post fourth straight week of declines.

Is Trump crashing markets intentionally? Speculation suggests administration might be forcing Fed rate cuts. Recession odds at 40%. BUIDL reaches $500M. Cboe aims to add staking to Fidelity's ETH ETF. Regulatory pivot sparks ETF filings surge.
news.summary: The article discusses the rising odds of a recession, crashing markets, and President Trump's approach with tariffs, drawing parallels to his previous term. Trump is said to potentially be deliberately causing market crashes to push the Federal Reserve into lowering interest rates. JPMorgan analysts have increased recession odds to 40%, while Goldman Sachs predicts a 20% chance due to US policies. BlackRock's BUIDL tokenization company has partnered with RedStone, expanding its use cases in DeFi and reaching $500 million in assets. Cboe BZX is seeking approval to add staking to Fidelity's Ether ETF, potentially boosting investor appeal. The SEC's regulatory pivot on crypto ETF filings since Trump's inauguration is also noted.

news.headline: Coinbase and Gemini aim to offer tokenized securities. Coinbase seeks approval, a goal predating its 2021 IPO.
news.summary: Is Coinbase on the verge of receiving approval to provide tokenized securities on its platform? The company has been keen on offering this service even before its public debut in 2021.

news.headline: Bocana Resources Corp cancels and reissues 2.4M stock options due to timeline issue with TSXV.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on March 14, 2025, Bocana Resources Corp. (TSXV: BOCA) (Frankfurt: VC1) received notification from the TSX Venture Exchange regarding the 2,400,000 stock options granted to directors and officers on May 24, 2024. These options were issued outside of the required timeline for the Company’s Stock-Based Compensation Plan to take effect. Consequently, the Company has decided to rescind the initial stock options granted on May 24, 2024, and will reissue them with the same terms as previously assigned.

news.headline: For the week, Dow down 3.07%, S&P 500 down 2.28%, Nasdaq down 2.43%.
BW Energy: Insider trading - Conversion of Restricted Share Units (RSUs) into shares, impacting company ownership.
news.summary: The latest report indicates that the unemployment rate has risen to 7.5%, with approximately 10.9 million people currently without jobs. This is a significant increase compared to the previous quarter. The data also reveals that the economy shrank by 2.3% in the last fiscal year, marking a concerning downturn. The government is now facing pressure to implement measures to stimulate growth and create more employment opportunities.Officials have acknowledged the severity of the situation and are working on strategies to address the economic challenges ahead. The report underscores the urgent need for intervention to boost the economy and alleviate the growing unemployment crisis.

news.headline: Skyward Specialty hires Patricia Ryan as new General Counsel, replacing Leslie Shaunty retiring after 12 years.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, Skyward Specialty Insurance Group, Inc.™ announced the recruitment of Patricia Ryan as their new General Counsel. This comes as Leslie Shaunty, the current General Counsel, prepares to retire after almost 12 years with the company. Ryan will assume her new role on April 1. Shaunty will remain in a support and transition position until the end of 2025. Skyward Specialty, a key player in the specialty property and casualty market, trades on Nasdaq under the symbol SKWD.

news.headline: Nurix Therapeutics granted inducement awards to 13 new employees on March 11, 2025, under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.summary: On March 11, 2025, Nurix Therapeutics, a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq as NRIX, based in San Francisco, revealed the awarding of inducement grants to thirteen recently hired personnel. These grants, issued under Nurix’s 2024 Equity Inducement Plan, were a crucial factor in the new employees joining the company and were sanctioned by the Compensation Committee of Nurix’s Board of Directors following Nasdaq regulations. Nurix specializes in developing targeted protein degradation drugs for cancer and inflammatory diseases, pioneering innovative treatments for these conditions.

news.headline: Motorsport Games (NASDAQ:MSGM) will report Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 20, 2025.
news.summary: Motorsport Games, listed on NASDAQ under the symbol MSGM, is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on Thursday, March 20, 2025. The company will provide insights into its performance during this period, including key figures such as revenue, earnings, and any other notable financial metrics. Investors and stakeholders are eagerly anticipating this report to gauge the company's financial health and future prospects in the competitive motorsport industry.

news.headline: Palladyne AI Corp awards employee equity under Equity Incentive Plans, shares undisclosed.
news.summary: Salt Lake City - Palladyne AI Corp., a company specializing in artificial intelligence software for defense and commercial robotic platforms, disclosed that the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors has sanctioned employee equity grants under the 2021 Equity Incentive Plan or the 2024 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan. These awards are part of the company's strategic plans for growth and development. Palladyne AI's announcement included the approval of a substantial number of shares for distribution to employees as part of these equity awards.

news.headline: Console & Associates, P.C. is investigating claims against Alarum Technologies Ltd. Stock purchased between March 14, 2024 and August 26, 2024 may be eligible for compensation.
news.summary: Investors who bought shares of Alarum Technologies between March 14, 2024, and August 26, 2024, could potentially receive compensation. A law firm based in Marlton, New Jersey, Console & Associates, P.C., is looking into possible claims against Alarum Technologies Ltd. listed on the NASDAQ. The investigation is related to activities during the specified period, and affected investors are encouraged to seek potential compensation.

news.summary: On March 14, 2025, GDS Wealth Management, a company located in Flower Mound, introduced an upcoming webinar series in three parts. The webinars aim to assist participants in optimizing their financial benefits and retirement plans. This opportunity is targeted towards individuals currently managing their wealth and planning for retirement.

news.headline: Wall Street enjoys strong bounce as S&P 500 up 2% after correction. Vet investor skeptical of market bottom.
news.summary: Wall Street is experiencing a significant uptick at the close of a turbulent week where the S&P 500 entered correction territory for the first time since October 2023. The S&P 500, monitored by the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE: SPY), rose by 2% in late afternoon trading in New York, marking the strongest surge in over four months. However, experienced investor Ed Yardeni remains cautious, labeling the rebound as a "scared cat bounce" rather than indicating a definitive market bottom. Yardeni pointed out two main factors driving the end-of-week rally. Firstly, Senate Democratic Leader Chuck Schumer's support for a Republican-backed short-term funding bill reduced the threat of a government shutdown. Secondly, President Donald Trump’s unexpected silence on tariffs was seen as a positive by investors. Yardeni warned that this may not signify the end of market turmoil.

news.headline: SES S.A. plans to add two new members to its Board of Directors, Ellen Lord and John Shaw, at the Annual General Meeting on 3 April 2025.
news.summary: SES S.A. announced plans for its Annual General Meeting on April 3, 2025, proposing the appointment of two new members to its Board of Directors. The nominees are Ellen Lord, previous Under Secretary of Defense for Acquisition and Sustainment at the US Department of Defense, and John Shaw. The AGM is a significant event for SES, a company operating in the telecommunications industry with a strong presence in global markets. The addition of these experienced individuals to the board can bring valuable expertise and insights.

news.headline: Study shows therapy dogs reduce child anxiety & need for anxiety meds in emergency depts, funded by HABRI and Pet Partners.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, the Human Animal Bond Research Institute (HABRI) and Pet Partners jointly released a new study demonstrating substantial decreases in both child and parental anxiety levels, leading to a diminished reliance on anxiety medication. The research findings highlight the positive impact of human-animal interaction on mental health, with a notable decrease in anxiety among participants. The study underscores the potential benefits of incorporating animal companionship into anxiety treatment strategies as an alternative or complementary approach. This study provides valuable insights into the effectiveness of the human-animal bond in promoting emotional well-being.

news.headline: Public urges Columbia to comply with Trump's funding requirements, as reported by Bloomberg.
RaaWee K12 Solutions launches RaaWee K12 Attendance+ NEXT in Plano, Texas to combat chronic absenteeism and truancy.

With a track record of over ten years in the field, the company is a leader in this area. The new version promises enhanced features and capabilities to tackle the issue more effectively.

news.headline: Quantum computing stocks, led by D-Wave, surged ahead of Nvidia's GTC conference, showing strong market anticipation.
news.summary: Shares of quantum computing companies, notably D-Wave, saw a surge in value on Friday in anticipation of chipmaker Nvidia's upcoming GTC conference. The market witnessed a notable increase in quantum computing stocks, with D-Wave leading the pack. This growth comes as investors keep a close eye on Nvidia's conference scheduled for next week. The momentum in quantum computing stocks reflects the growing interest and potential in this sector. This development was highlighted in an article on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: TSLA stock falls for 8 weeks due to Musk's actions. BYD near highs amid fast-charging push.
news.summary: The stock of TSLA has been on a downward trend for eight consecutive weeks while Elon Musk's actions contribute to what is perceived as damaging the Tesla brand. On the other hand, BYD stock is reaching near its peak as it gears up for a significant fast-charging initiative. Interestingly, TSLA's stock decline continues, possibly influenced by concerns over the company's brand integrity, while BYD appears to be advancing, poised for a notable increase in fast-charging capabilities. This comparison between Tesla and BYD was detailed in an article published by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: CFTC Positions in the Week Ended March 11th
Dow Jones up by 650 points, Nvidia leads, Ulta tops S&P 500. Biotech skyrockets 12% and tops 3 IBD lists.
news.summary: This afternoon, the Dow Jones and S&P 500 witnessed significant increases in value. Nvidia emerged as the top performer in the Dow while Ulta dominated the S&P 500 on the stock market. Notably, the Dow Jones gained 650 points on the day. Additionally, a biotech company experienced a 12% surge in their stock price, propelling them to the top of three IBD (Investor's Business Daily) lists. This information was shared without disclosing the source.

news.headline: Frank J. Lombardo, a 60-year-old partner at WRSMH, passes away. Colleagues remember him as a dedicated advocate.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, the law firm WRSMH expressed sadness over the death of Frank J. Lombardo, a valued partner known for his dedication to clients. Lombardo, 60 years old, was a respected advocate at the firm. His passing is deeply mourned by WRSMH.

news.headline: Bitcoin surges, approaching $85,000, with Ethereum, XRP, and Dogecoin also up. Notable drop in large transactions and liquidated traders. Putin hints at using BTC to circumvent sanctions. Trump-backed company raises $590M in token sales.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets are showing strong gains, with Bitcoin reaching $84,793.95 (+5%), Ethereum at $1,939.46 (+4.6%), Solana at $134.25 (+9.2%), XRP at $2.35 (+4.3%), Dogecoin at $0.1713 (+4.2%), and Shiba Inu at $0.00001265 (+5.7%). Noteworthy stats include a 15.5% decrease in large transaction volume and a 3.6% increase in daily active addresses. Transactions over $100,000 dropped from 10,064 to 9,548 in a day, and exchanges netflows are down by 87.8%. Coinglass data shows 69,998 traders liquidated in the past day for $171.48 million. Developments include Putin's statement on Bitcoin, World Liberty Financial raising $590M, and the Trump Administration's Bitcoin strategy. Full article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: CRE Finance Council welcomes FHFA Director Bill Pulte, representing $6 trillion real estate finance industry.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, the CRE Finance Council (CREFC) issued a statement through their President and CEO. Representing the commercial and multifamily real estate finance sector valued at around $6 trillion, the trade association emphasized its commitment to the industry.

news.headline: Woodward Park Partners helps Federal Civil Group acquire Allied Construction, a top asphalt paving company.
news.summary: Woodward Park Partners announced on March 14, 2025, that Federal Civil Group, LLC has successfully acquired F. Allied Construction, Inc., a prominent asphalt paving company. The acquisition marks a significant move for Federal Civil Group, further strengthening its position in the industry. The specific financial details of the transaction were not disclosed. Federal Civil Group's strategic decision to acquire Allied Construction reflects their commitment to expanding their portfolio and market presence. This acquisition is expected to have a substantial impact on Federal Civil Group's overall operations and growth trajectory.

news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group offers IT leaders a four-step blueprint for AI compliance, mitigating legal risks.
news.summary: Info-Tech Research Group has introduced a detailed plan consisting of four steps to assist IT leaders in managing the increasing complexity of AI compliance. The resource presents a risk-based strategy to offer essential information for IT leaders to reduce legal risks and keep up with tightening global regulations in the artificial intelligence sphere.

news.headline: Monday FX Option Expiries
RLNC tech from MIT can enhance Web3 with scalability. Founder Médard aims to solve bottlenecks for blockchains. Source: DefiLlama.
news.summary: MIT Professor Muriel Médard's technology, Random Linear Network Coding (RLNC), after 15 years of research, is now ready for commercialization in the Web3 industry. It offers a breakthrough in coding, aiding in faster transmission and reduced bandwidth usage. Optimum, a decentralized memory infrastructure built using RLNC, was founded by Médard and Nancy Lynch, aiming to enhance Web3 scalability. RLNC has applications in industries like 5G, satellite telecommunications, and IoT. Scalability is a pressing issue for blockchains, and RLNC can aid in overcoming bottlenecks by encoding data into mathematical equations. Optimum has received investments from notable figures like Sandeep Nailwal and is looking to revolutionize Web3 infrastructure. Scalability is vital as blockchain adoption grows, and solutions like RLNC are crucial for the industry's expansion.

news.headline: XRP surpasses Ether in FDV at $235B, forging ahead in DeFi ecosystem. XRP's price rises 300% post-elections to $2.3 per token. Regulatory developments favor XRP, as SEC wraps up action against Ripple. Ethereum faces challenges post-Dencun upgrade, Solana sees high trading volume.
news.summary: XRP's fully diluted valuation (FDV) has surpassed Ether (ETH) on March 14, as per CoinGecko data. XRP's FDV is nearly $235 billion, higher than Ether's $233 billion. Ripple Labs holds a significant XRP allocation. XRP's price surged more than 300% since November 5 due to favorable US regulatory environment for crypto. The US may include XRP in a proposed Digital Asset Stockpile. The SEC is wrapping up an enforcement action against Ripple. Ether's price has struggled since the Dencun upgrade. Solana's trading volume rivals Ethereum's and its layer-2 chains combined.

news.headline: Bitcoin and Ethereum have seen an 83% CAGR since 2020 lows, outperforming S&P 500's 20% CAGR. Ethereum briefly dipped below key trendline but closed above. Bitcoin dropped from $94,265 to $80,699, while Ethereum fell from $2,518 to $2,020. Both assets show identical long-term growth since March 13, 2020.
news.summary: A recent report by Swiss digital asset service provider, Copper.co, highlights a significant correlation between Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH), and the S&P 500. The report reveals that both BTC and ETH have seen an 83% compound annual growth rate (CAGR) since hitting their lows in 2020, outperforming the S&P 500's 20% CAGR over the same period. Ethereum briefly dropped below a crucial trendline on the fifth anniversary of Black Thursday but managed to close above it, sparking concerns about its sustainability at that level. Analysis from Copper.co shows that Bitcoin fell from $94,265 to $80,699 between March 3 and March 10, while Ethereum dropped from $2,518 to $2,020 during the same timeframe. Despite these declines, both assets have exhibited comparable long-term growth since March 13, 2020. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: U.S. stocks surge in final hour, aim to bounce back from a difficult week with impressive gains.

CenterPoint Energy is monitoring fire risk; National Weather Service issued "Fire Weather Watch" for Texas, incl Greater Houston area, with strong winds and fire danger on Saturday from noon to 9 p.m. CenterPoint collaborating with local emergency partners to prepare and communicate with customers.
news.summary: A "Fire Weather Watch" has been issued by the National Weather Service for extensive areas of Texas, signaling the potential for elevated fire danger due to strong winds. In the Greater Houston region, the alert is in effect from noon to 9 p.m. on Saturday. Local utility company CenterPoint is collaborating closely with emergency agencies and will be sharing updates with its customers regarding the situation.

news.headline: Exelon's digital roadmap and ICT budget uncovered in new report, leveraging AI & cloud computing to enhance services.
news.summary: Dublin - ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently included the company profile of Exelon Corporation in its offerings. The Exelon Corporation Tech Ecosystem Report 2024 offers detailed information on Exelon's digital transformation strategies, innovation programs, and technology initiatives. Exelon, a prominent utility services firm, utilizes artificial intelligence, cloud computing, and energy technology to improve power generation, distribution, and energy services. The report contains crucial insights into Exelon's tech strategies and initiatives.

news.headline: Edison International's SCE to conduct physical and video inspections in Eaton Canyon following Eaton Fire.
news.summary: A subsidiary of Edison International, Southern California Edison, is set to commence the next phase of physical and video inspections as well as testing of electrical equipment in Eaton Canyon starting on March 17. This stage is anticipated to span over several weeks in the field before transitioning to laboratory and engineering analysis. It marks SCE's primary close-up physical inspection post the initiation of the Eaton Fire. The investigation is closely coordinated and in partnership with relevant authorities.

news.headline: US House overturns IRS DeFi broker rule; Solana maintains 80% inflation; Bitcoin's $70,000 retracement deemed part of the bull market correction. Calls for stricter rules on political memecoins post $4 billion Libra loss; Hyperliquid raises margin requirements post $4M liquidation. DeFi market sees top 100 cryptos in the red this week.
news.summary: The US House of Representatives voted to nullify a bill that would have required DeFi protocols to report to the IRS, with 292 votes for and 132 against. The Solana network's proposal to reduce inflation by 80% was rejected, with 43.6% in favor and 27.4% against. Bitcoin experienced a 14% drop to around $80,708 but analysts attribute it to a macro correction in the bull market. President Trump's lack of direct Bitcoin investments caused investor disappointment. Calls for stricter regulations on politically endorsed cryptocurrencies were made after the $4 billion collapse of Libra token endorsed by Argentine President Javier Milei, due to insider cash-outs. Hyperliquid increased margin requirements for traders after losing $4 million during a massive Ether liquidation. Most of the top 100 cryptocurrencies saw a decline in value, with HBAR losing over 24% and JasmyCoin down over 21% in the past week.

(NYSE: TWI), a prominent worldwide producer of off-highway wheels, tires, assemblies, and undercarriage products, revealed their decision to take part in the forthcoming Sidoti event. This event signifies a significant opportunity for the company to engage with investors and stakeholders. Titan International's participation underscores their commitment to maintaining strong relationships within the industry.

news.headline: Special meeting of IBank Board on March 17, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Sacramento, CA. Public participation via teleconference.
news.summary: A special meeting of the IBank Board is scheduled in Sacramento, California, on Monday, March 17, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. The meeting will take place at the Bergeson Peace Board Room located at 1325 J Street, Suite 1300. Public participation is available via teleconference at (888) 788-0099 or through Zoom Meeting ID 825 5538 0274. The agenda includes a call to order and roll call, an action item with a public comment period. This meeting is in accordance with Government Code Section 11125.4, Subd. (a).

news.headline: BlackRock holds 567K+ BTC worth $47B, with $11.6T AUM. Recent BTC acquisition of 268 BTC valued $22M on Mar 14.持BTC: 567,000+,值$47B。最近268BTC交易值$22M。BlackRock率持者，占比全球最大。
news.summary: BlackRock, the world's largest asset manager with $11.6 trillion in assets, holds over 567,000 Bitcoin valued at $47.8 billion. Their most recent BTC acquisition was 268 BTC worth $22 million. They also hold over 1.2 million Ether, 70 million USDC, and various altcoins. BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin fund had $193 million in outflows on March 9 and saw $756 million in outflows for BTC ETFs this month. Despite market uncertainty, BlackRock added the iShares Bitcoin ETF to its model portfolio in February 2025. Model portfolios are preset investment plans promoted to investors by asset managers, driving capital inflows for included assets like the IBIT ETF.

news.headline: Beulah Henry, renowned inventor, known as Lady Edison, reimagined toys, typewriters, umbrellas, and ice-cream makers.
news.summary: Known for her innovative nature, she gained the moniker Lady Edison for her prolific work in redesigning a diverse range of products, including toys, typewriters, umbrellas, and ice-cream makers.
